compiled_state.title: CLAUDE.md: document governance permits bloat -> manual cleanup required by user (ref: c5478928)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

CLAUDE.md accumulates bloat over time despite document governance processes that should prevent it. The user manually removed ~29 lines in commit c5478928 ('CLAUDE.md optimization') including: duplicate agent-behavior rules that appeared in both the 'Always Do These' section and a separate 'Task Start Workflow' section, architectural implementation details that agents do not need every session (sub-agent guard internals, context detection methods, plan-approval workflow), and the full /dso:onboarding documentation which is only relevant once during project setup.

## Expected Behavior

CLAUDE.md should contain ONLY information agents need during normal workflows: brainstorm, debug-everything, and sprint. The following categories of content should be blocked or removed:
- Duplicate instructions that appear in multiple sections
- Architectural details better suited to plugin docs (e.g., INSTALL.md, SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md)
- Once-only setup instructions (e.g., /dso:onboarding behaviors)
- Implementation specifics that duplicate skill SKILL.md content

## Actual Behavior

Three enforcement mechanisms exist but fail to prevent bloat:
1. The doc-writer sub-agent (/dso:doc-writer) — dispatched by /dso:sprint for doc stories, but not for CLAUDE.md specifically
2. The document review overlay — unclear if it checks CLAUDE.md for bloat vs. accuracy only
3. The preplanning/implementation-plan processes — create documentation tickets but no CLAUDE.md size discipline gate

## Root Cause (Preliminary)

No automated gate enforces a CLAUDE.md content scope policy. When tasks are completed and CLAUDE.md is updated (e.g., 'add agent to routing table'), there is no check that the added content belongs in CLAUDE.md rather than a plugin doc or skill file. LLM agents default to adding to CLAUDE.md because it's the most visible documentation file.

## Reproduction

Review git log for commits with 'docs(CLAUDE.md)' or 'docs(claude-md)' prefix — each commit tends to add content without removing equivalent or superseded content.

Reference commit (user cleanup): c5478928 ('CLAUDE.md optimization') — removed 29 lines including Task Start Workflow section, Plan Mode Post-Approval Workflow section, sub-agent guard implementation details, and /dso:onboarding full documentation.

## Escalation Note

This bug may be escalated to the user if bot-psychologist does not have high confidence in its proposed fix or if the scope of the fix exceeds a single bug fix (e.g., if it requires a new gate mechanism, policy changes across multiple skills, or structural changes to the document governance system).
